Product name: Talkh chikher, Misheel brand, Rye bread

pretreatment_conditions.Cooking (processing) method: direct use, toast. Rye is prepared from a  pure, naturally fermented culture. That is why it has a unique and pleasant taste and smell of rye. Rye bread is contains in various minerals, fiber and E, PP, B vitamins.
pretreatment_conditions.Other cooking (processing) conditions: Remark: People allergic to gluten protein from grains, take note.
pretreatment_conditions.Reference for condition setting: Store for 48 hour at nom higher than 15*C-18*C with relative humidity nk more than 70% in a cool dry place away from sunlight

collection_information.Additional collection information: Product name: Talkh chikher, Atar brand, wheat bread

pretreatment_conditions.Cooking (processing) method: direct use, toast. A unique product that has not been changed for 30 years, a unique fragrance and flavor that is considered to be the best for consumers.
pretreatment_conditions.Other cooking (processing) conditions: Remark: People allergic to gluten protein from grains, take note.
pretreatment_conditions.Reference for condition setting: Store for 48 hour at nom higher than 15*C-18*C with relative humidity nk more than 70% in a cool dry place away from sunlight

collection_information.Additional collection information: Product name: Talkh chikher, Special brand, Multi-seeded crop, fortified multigrain

pretreatment_conditions.Cooking (processing) method: direct use, toast. Contains rye flour, sunflower seeds, culture, sesame seeds, hercules. This product improves intestinal motility. Therefore, it is more suitablefor people who are overweight or who are maintaining weight.
pretreatment_conditions.Other cooking (processing) conditions: Remark: People allergic to gluten protein from grains, take note.
pretreatment_conditions.Reference for condition setting: Store for 72 hour at nom higher than 15*C-18*C with relative humidity nk more than 70% in a cool dry place away from sunlight

collection_information.Additional collection information: Product name: Lapsha, Ribbon noodle with multigrain flour

pretreatment_conditions.Cooking (processing) method: Boil for 7 to 9 minutes in hot boiling water. After cooking, soak in cold water and drainthrough colander. Prepared noodles can be used for any kind of meals.
pretreatment_conditions.Other cooking (processing) conditions: Remark: Check whether storage conditions is proper before use6 People who has allergy from the ingredient must it by suitable amount.
pretreatment_conditions.Reference for condition setting: Store for 12 months at nom higher than 30*C with relative humidity nk more than 70%
